customer_name.evidence: Ashok ji se baat ho rahi hai?

occupation.evidence: Main ji driver aadmi hun, main tractor chalata hun, main driver hun.

occupation_detail.evidence: Main ji driver aadmi hun, main tractor chalata hun, main driver hun.

income_band_inr.evidence: mahine ka maan ke chalo aap 20-30,000 rupaye aa jate hain, bhaiya jaise kaam aa jata hai toh 60-70 bhi ho jate hain, lakh bhi ho jate hain.

temperature.evidence: dekho ji mushkil banega sir ji, dekho aap main aap se aapka time barbad karun, chalegi nahi baat mere saath.

objections.quote: 10,000 mahine ka bahut zyada ho jayega
gaadi ki hamari kisht hai, phir driver ki tankha hai, toh dekho ye sara kaam ek dum se manage nahi hoga.

customer_pain_points: high monthly financial commitments (EMI and driver salary)

monthly_savings_capacity_inr.evidence: 10,000 mahine ka bahut zyada ho jayega

decision_maker_status.evidence: mere ko jab baat dekho ab main baat karunga ghar pe

agent_promises: pehle saal se hi ek guaranteed aur regular income
first day se aapka life insurance cover hai

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer has high fixed financial obligations and cannot afford the premium.

approachability.reasoning: Customer explicitly stated that the plan is not feasible for him due to high existing financial commitments and asked not to waste time.

call_narrative.opening_hook: The agent introduced himself as calling from Tata AIA Life to offer a guaranteed savings plan, and the customer asked for details.
call_narrative.customer_response: The customer was initially passive but became firm in his refusal once he realized the financial commitment was not feasible for his current situation.
call_narrative.key_event: The customer explained his high monthly financial obligations (vehicle EMI and driver salary) and concluded that he could not afford the plan.
call_narrative.ending: The customer politely but firmly ended the call by stating that the plan would not work for him and asked the agent not to waste time.

key_quotes: main anpadh aadmi hun, mere ladke ko samjha do
gaadi ki hamari kisht hai, phir driver ki tankha hai, toh dekho ye sara kaam ek dum se manage nahi hoga.
dekho ji mushkil banega sir ji, dekho aap main aap se aapka time barbad karun, chalegi nahi baat mere saath.
